test.template: Run the vitest unit tests with `npm test`. Report the results, including any failures or errors.

fix.template: Format and lint the entire codebase by running `npm run fix:all`. Run `git diff` afterward to confirm changes.
fix.description: Format + lint fix the entire codebase

start.template: Start the dev server by running `npm start`. This runs tsc --watch, serve on port 9090, and the format/lint watcher concurrently.
start.description: Start dev server (tsc watch + serve + lint/format watcher)

graphify.template: Run `graphify update .` from the project root to rebuild the graphify-out/ knowledge graph. Report whether it succeeded.
